era_context: Late Fifth Dynasty Egypt, Akkadian Empire under Naram-Sin, mature phase Indus Valley Civilization. This year falls within the same broad historical period as the preceding years in this batch.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified; no events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: The year -2780 is not distinguished by any documented historical event in surviving sources. The historical record for the late third millennium BCE is episodic; most years are archaeologically and textually invisible.
